name: Sweet and Sour Relish Aspic
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in 1/2 cup of cold water.
2. Dissolve the softened gelatin in hot water and add the remaining cold water.
3. Add sugar, vinegar, and salt; mix well.
4. Gradually add green food coloring until the desired color is achieved.
5. Allow the mixture to cool and refrigerate until set.
6. When the mixture begins to thicken, add the remaining ingredients and stir to blend.
7. Pour into a wet ring mold or 9-inch square pan and chill until set.
8. Serve plain or with mayonnaise.
Serves: 8
